translation.welcome_msg: Welcome to MatdataApp. Let's get started.
translation.eligibility_subtitle: Find out if you are eligible to register as a voter in India.
translation.eligibility_q1: Are you 18 years or older (or will you turn 18 by the qualifying date)?
translation.eligibility_q2: Are you a citizen of India?
translation.eligibility_q3: Are you ordinarily a resident of the constituency you want to register in?
translation.eligibility_q4: Have you been disqualified from voting by any court or authority?
translation.eligible_msg: Based on your answers, you appear to be eligible to register as a voter in India! Please note that this is general guidance and not a legal determination.
translation.register_form6: To apply for new voter registration, you can fill out Form 6 online at the official Election Commission of India portal:
translation.reason_age: You must be 18 years or older (or turning 18 by the qualifying date) to register.
translation.reason_citizen: Only citizens of India are eligible to register and vote in Indian elections.
translation.reason_resident: You must be an ordinary resident of the constituency where you wish to register.
translation.reason_disqualified: Persons disqualified by a court of law or authorized electoral authority are not eligible to register.
translation.cookie_consent_text: We use cookies to analyze site traffic and behavior (via Google Analytics).
translation.meta_home_desc: Discover everything you need to know about Indian elections: AI chatbot, voting timelines, educational flashcards, candidate info, and booth finder.
translation.meta_timeline_desc: Track key voting deadlines, voter registration dates, and election phases in India.
translation.meta_learn_desc: Master democratic and voting concepts in India with interactive, bilingual flashcards using spaced repetition.
translation.meta_candidates_desc: Search and explore details of election candidates in India, including party affiliation, constituency, assets, and criminal records.
translation.meta_compare_desc: Compare profiles, educational qualification, assets, and criminal histories of political candidates side-by-side.
translation.meta_booth_desc: Locate your assigned polling booth and view details on the map using your EPIC voter ID number.
translation.meta_chatbot_desc: Ask our Google Gemini AI powered election chatbot anything about Indian voting, Voter ID, and rules.
translation.meta_eligibility_desc: Check if you are eligible to register as a voter in India and get ECI Form 6 registration instructions.
translation.meta_privacy_desc: Learn how MatdataApp handles user queries, mock voter ID searches, third-party embeds, and cookie configurations.
translation.meta_cookie_desc: Details on cookies and local storage items used on MatdataApp for analytics and card learning progress.
